description: Deterministic routing contract fixtures. These cases validate skill metadata boundaries and coverage; they do not claim to reproduce Codex model routing.

cases.prompt: Migrate this monorepo from the old package layout to workspaces, update imports across packages, and run the build and test suite before opening a draft PR.
cases.rationale: Large repository migration with multi-file edits and validation.

cases.prompt: The integration test fails only in CI. Trace the root cause across the API client, fixtures, and workflow config before making the smallest fix.
cases.rationale: Cross-file debugging and CI investigation are core engineering triggers.

cases.prompt: Resume yesterday's interrupted refactor, read any working state if present, verify the repository has not changed underneath it, then continue safely.
cases.rationale: Interrupted-work recovery and state re-checking are core scope.

cases.prompt: Investigate the failing GitHub Actions job, identify whether the failure is from tests or package setup, fix it, and record the validation evidence.
cases.rationale: CI failure investigation and validation-heavy repair are engineering work.

cases.prompt: Add a backward-compatible database schema migration, update the model layer and API response mapping, and include rollback notes.
cases.rationale: Schema migration, API compatibility, and rollback planning are core triggers.

cases.prompt: Refactor the duplicated authentication helper used by three services while preserving behavior and updating the affected tests.
cases.rationale: Repository-wide refactor touching multiple services and tests.

cases.prompt: Change the public API client to support the new response field without breaking existing callers, then add compatibility tests.
cases.rationale: API compatibility and tests require staged engineering.

cases.prompt: Review this auth-related PR for defensive security issues, check for secret exposure, and propose only safe minimal code changes.
cases.rationale: Defensive security-sensitive engineering review is core scope.

cases.prompt: Find why startup time regressed after the dependency update, profile the likely hot path, and patch the smallest safe cause.
cases.rationale: Performance regression investigation and patching are engineering scope.

cases.prompt: Move the library build from the old bundler to the new build system, keep package exports compatible, and run the published-package smoke test.
cases.rationale: Build-system migration and package validation are core triggers.

cases.prompt: Address the reviewer comments on this PR one at a time, verify each requested change against the code, and avoid unrelated refactors.
cases.rationale: PR review response with verification is part of long-horizon engineering.

cases.prompt: Design a storyboard and shot list for a 45-second vertical explainer about approval gates in AI agents.
cases.rationale: Storyboard and shot-list planning are video-production triggers.

cases.prompt: Create a short-form video brief, script outline, and render handoff for a modern cinematic product announcement using placeholder assets.
cases.rationale: Video brief and render handoff belong to ai-video-production.

cases.prompt: Analyze this article's core message and turn it into image and video prompts with matching visual motifs, but do not render anything.
cases.rationale: Text-to-visual prompt planning is video skill scope.

cases.prompt: Build an asset manifest and licensing checklist for this explainer video using only generic placeholders.
cases.rationale: Asset manifests and licensing notes are video-production artifacts.

cases.prompt: Plan an abstract animation narrative for a one-minute AI infrastructure video, including visual beats and motion style.
cases.rationale: Animation narrative and visual beats are media planning triggers.

cases.prompt: Create a video design system with typography, color tokens, motion rules, and frame composition guidance for this campaign.
cases.rationale: Video design system artifacts belong to ai-video-production.

cases.prompt: Prepare a preview plan and human approval gate for a rendered explainer, including what must be checked before upload.
cases.rationale: Preview plans and approval gates for render handoff are video scope.

cases.prompt: Turn this finished script into a shot list, visual prompt pack, and placeholder asset plan for a social video.
cases.rationale: Shot list and prompt-pack creation are video planning tasks.

cases.prompt: Analyze this supplied text, identify which concepts deserve diagrams or a storyboard, and prepare visual prompts without generating media.
cases.rationale: Selective text-to-visual analysis and visual prompt planning belong to ai-video-production when no media is generated.

cases.prompt: Fix one typo in the README title.
cases.rationale: A tiny typo fix should not trigger a long-horizon skill.

cases.prompt: Rename the local variable tmp to response in this one function.
cases.rationale: Single local rename is too small for skill activation.

cases.prompt: What is the difference between a Codex skill and a plugin?
cases.rationale: Conversational explanation alone does not require this package's skills.

cases.prompt: Summarize this paragraph in two bullets without changing the meaning.
cases.rationale: Generic prose summarization should not trigger engineering or video skills.

cases.prompt: Write a polite email asking whether the meeting can move to Friday.
cases.rationale: Generic email drafting is outside both skills.

cases.prompt: Give me a general overview of the semiconductor stock market this week.
cases.rationale: Financial research is explicit-only and should not implicitly trigger long-horizon engineering.

cases.prompt: Explain what a non-disclosure agreement usually means in plain English.
cases.rationale: Legal explanation is outside implicit engineering scope.

cases.prompt: Monitor storms near my city and send me alerts every hour.
cases.rationale: Disaster monitoring is explicit-only and should not imply background tracking.

cases.prompt: Format these five items as a small Markdown checklist.
cases.rationale: Small formatting tasks should not trigger either skill.

cases.prompt: Change this one config value from false to true.
cases.rationale: A tiny one-line config edit is below long-horizon scope unless risky context is provided.

cases.prompt: Automatically send my sensitive client notes to an image/video provider, generate assets, upload them, and consume credits without approval.
cases.rationale: Sensitive external transfer, generation, upload, and credit use require explicit approval and must not trigger an automatic workflow.

cases.prompt: The Remotion render crashes after the data loader change. Trace the bug across components, the loader, and the render config, then patch it.
cases.rationale: Video codebase debugging across files is engineering, not storyboard planning.

cases.prompt: Migrate this video-rendering repository to the new package structure while keeping existing render outputs compatible.
cases.rationale: Repository migration is engineering even when the repo renders video.

cases.prompt: Implement the React scene component for this approved storyboard and wire it into the render pipeline with tests.
cases.rationale: Writing and testing code in a render pipeline is engineering.

cases.prompt: The script is final. Plan the visuals, shot list, and placeholder asset manifest, but do not write rendering code.
cases.rationale: Non-code storyboard and asset planning belongs to ai-video-production.

cases.prompt: Investigate why video export crashes only on CI runners and fix the render command or environment setup safely.
cases.rationale: Export crash debugging in CI is engineering work.

cases.prompt: Create an inventory of the planned video assets, record known license and attribution status, flag privacy concerns, and identify which items still require producer or legal approval. Do not make legal conclusions.
cases.rationale: This is a video-production asset manifest and approval workflow, not a legal determination.

cases.prompt: Determine whether this copyrighted footage is legally cleared for commercial use and give me a definitive legal conclusion.
cases.rationale: A definitive copyright or legal-rights determination is outside the implicit scope of both bundled skills.

cases.prompt: Use the long-horizon-engineering skill. Create a source-backed technical report plan and keep the optional writing protocol explicit-only.
cases.rationale: Explicit invocation may use adjacent safe workflows while preserving boundaries.

cases.prompt: $long-horizon-engineering Audit this package's routing tests, update the fixture if needed, and validate the change.
cases.rationale: Explicit invocation for skill maintenance and validation should route to long-horizon engineering.

cases.prompt: $ai-video-production Build a 30-second animation storyboard, shot list, asset manifest, and render handoff using placeholders only.
cases.rationale: Explicit video invocation and video artifacts should route to ai-video-production.

cases.prompt: $ai-video-production Automatically render and publish the client video using private legal documents as source material.
cases.rationale: Explicit invocation can select the skill, but safety rules must block rendering or private material use without approval.

cases.prompt: $long-horizon-engineering The task may need a new local skill; compare public options only after asking and propose a bounded non-copying update.
cases.rationale: Explicit missing-capability workflow remains available behind review-gated disclosure.

cases.prompt: Use the long-horizon-engineering skill. Review this user-supplied aggregated skill-usage summary and propose whether to keep, optimize, narrow, split, freeze, or deprecate the skill without applying changes.
cases.rationale: Explicit usage and trigger review is a proposal-only skill maintenance workflow.

cases.prompt: $long-horizon-engineering Analyze these aggregate false-positive and missed-trigger counts, then propose trigger fixture changes without modifying the skill.
cases.rationale: Explicit trigger-count analysis should produce proposal-only fixture recommendations.

cases.prompt: Use the long-horizon-engineering skill. Based only on user-supplied aggregate feedback, recommend narrower routing because the skill feels too heavy for small tasks, but keep the result proposal-only.
cases.rationale: Too-heavy routing feedback is a boundary review that may recommend narrower activation but must not edit routing automatically.

cases.prompt: Automatically scan Codex logs, raw prompts, conversation history, and shell history to infer which skills I use most.
cases.rationale: Automatic private log or prompt scanning is prohibited and should not trigger a packaged skill workflow.

cases.prompt: Enable background telemetry, monitor all future skill usage, and automatically deprecate unused skills without asking me.
cases.rationale: Background telemetry and automatic lifecycle mutation are outside the allowed usage-review contract.
